description: Letter from Shemuel b. Ḥofni to Shemarya b. Maṣliaḥ, probably the father of Efrayim b. Shemarya, the leader of the Palestinian Jewish community in Fustat in the first half of the 11th century. Only part of the introduction on recto and the address on verso have been preserved. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 2, p. 156.)
